title: LSA International Metropolitan Wine Glass 400ml Clear | Set of 4 | Dishwasher Safe | MW03
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: A set of four modern glasses suitable for serving wine in both casual and formal settings.
Dishwasher safe. We recommend a low temperature cycle and a mild detergent.
description: From the manufacturer LSA About Us LSA International is a London-based design studio specialising in contemporary handmade glass. Our ambition is to use skilled craft to create thoughtful, considered designs with intrinsic value.We design for people with the aim of understanding the purpose and the environment in which objects are used. Thoughtful, considered design. LSA Metropolitan Wine Glass Set of four contemporary wine glasses with tall, elegant stems. The angular bowl tapers towards a fine rim. Made from lead-free crystalline glass for clarity and strength. Tall stems. Fine rims. Dishwasher safe.
